front: Artist: memoir Down Below describes being drugged with cardiazol after being deemed 'incurably insane'
Artist: stomach became 'mirror of the earth'
Artist: friends with Remedios Varo and Kati Horna ('three witches')
Artist: brewed Surrealist potions in Mexico City
Artist: grew up at the Gothic mansion Crookhey Hall
Artist: called her father 'Lord Candlestick' in paintings
Artist: illustrated Elena Poniatowska's Lilus Kikus
Artist: 2022 Venice Biennale 'The Milk of Dreams' honored this artist
Artist: wrote The Hearing Trumpet, about 90-year-old Marian Leatherby eavesdropping on plans to send her to a retirement home that turns out to be a cult
Artist: in The Hearing Trumpet, protagonist acquires the title device while praying to the planet Venus; visitors include wolf-headed Anubeth and immortal postman Taliesin
Painting: portrait of this artist's lover depicts him in a red coat with a mermaid tail in a frozen landscape; subtitled 'Bird Superior'
back: Portrait of Max Ernst / Bird Superior (Leonora Carrington)

front: Artist: both this artist and Meret Oppenheim had affairs with Max Ernst, who pioneered frottage and grattage
Painting: this artist's version of The Temptation of St. Anthony depicts the central man as very old, three-headed, and wearing an eggshell-like hood
back: The Temptation of St. Anthony (Leonora Carrington)

front: Artist: tarot cards discovered by Tere Arcq during 2018 retrospective, published by Fulgur Press in 2021
